creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Sure.

===> Compressing man pages (compress-man)
====> Running Q/A tests (stage-qa)
Error: /usr/local/bin/gcolor2 is linked to /usr/local/lib/libharfbuzz.so.0 from print/harfbuzz but it is not declared as a dependency
Warning: you need LIB_DEPENDS+=libharfbuzz.so:print/harfbuzz
Error: /usr/local/bin/gcolor2 is linked to /usr/local/lib/libcairo.so.2 from graphics/cairo but it is not declared as a dependency
Warning: you need USE_GNOME+=cairo
Error: /usr/local/bin/gcolor2 is linked to /usr/local/lib/libgdk_pixbuf-2.0.so.0 from graphics/gdk-pixbuf2 but it is not declared as a dependency
Warning: you need USE_GNOME+=gdkpixbuf2
Error: /usr/local/bin/gcolor2 is linked to /usr/local/lib/libfontconfig.so.1 from x11-fonts/fontconfig but it is not declared as a dependency
Warning: you need LIB_DEPENDS+=libfontconfig.so:x11-fonts/fontconfig
Error: /usr/local/bin/gcolor2 is linked to /usr/local/lib/libfreetype.so.6 from print/freetype2 but it is not declared as a dependency
Warning: you need LIB_DEPENDS+=libfreetype.so:print/freetype2
====> Checking for pkg-plist issues (check-plist)
===> Parsing plist
===> Checking for items in STAGEDIR missing from pkg-plist
===> Checking for items in pkg-plist which are not in STAGEDIR
===> No pkg-plist issues found (check-plist)
